cases.prompt: review this plan in CEO mode, is it ambitious enough or should we think bigger?

assertions.text: Rethinks the problem and looks for the 10-star product, challenging the plan's premises
Frames the review across its modes: scope expansion, selective expansion, hold scope, or scope reduction
Walks through it interactively with opinionated recommendations the user decides on

cases.prompt: 이 계획 전략 리뷰해줘, 스코프 더 키울지 다시 생각해보자

assertions.text: Expands scope only when it creates a better product, not for its own sake
Presents an outside-voice recommendation as a choice rather than acting on it unilaterally

cases.prompt: rethink this plan, I want a strategy review before we commit

assertions.text: Challenges the underlying premises before scoring or locking the plan
Considers scope reduction (strip to essentials) as a valid mode, not only expansion
